title: linux-admin expanded to 101 skills
summary: linux-admin now documents 101 expert skills, including minimal architecture, Linux source guarding, server memory, web stack security, chief engineer dispatch, and agent/model routing.
highlights: Added six new skills for architecture, source-change safety, server context memory, web stack security, Linux chief-engineer dispatch, and multi-model agent routing.
README, package metadata, plugin metadata, release notes, and website popup now agree on version 1.17.71 and 101 skills.
The server memory skill stores login flow and vault references only, not plaintext secrets.
Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and agent-assisted Linux administration workflows remain documented through AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs/CODEX_USAGE.md.
